description: Check if antigravity folder exists and list Desktop directories
command_preview: Write-Output "=== Check Desktop path ==="; Write-Output $env:USERPROFILE\Desktop; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\antigravity"; Write-Output "=== List Desktop folders ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop" -Directory | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "=== Search for antigravity ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop" -Directory -Filter '*anti*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE" -Directory -Filter '*antigravity*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName
output:
=== Check Desktop path ===
C:\Users\Revexn\Desktop
True
=== List Desktop folders ===

Name       
----       
antigravity
Documents  
ia agent   
Images     
Projects   
Shortcuts  
Tools      
vs code
